name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: 2 in 12 Hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter - it was just announced that Gov. John Kasich has received the endorsement of the Boston Globe and the Concord Monitor. This follows the recent endorsements of several other major newspapers in both Iowa and New Hampshire.
**We're exactly two weeks away from the NH Primary and need to keep up our momentum!**
[Please consider chipping in $25 or whatever you can to help!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117396:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
[From the Concord Monitor:](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117397:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
_" For months, each Republican candidate for president has told New Hampshire voters why he or she belongs in the White House. The one with the best record to support his case is John Kasich..."

_
_" In this most contentious of election cycles, Kasich has fought to keep the discussion focused on the issues that really matter to the American people - all the American people. It would be a mistake, however, to assume that Kasich isn't angry about where the nation is right now and where it's headed.

_
_When Monitor editors met with Kasich last year, he was tough and blunt, and had no interest in sparing anyone 's feelings. The difference between Kasich and some of his opponents, however, is that Kasich doesn't use his bluntness as a campaign prop. He is an old-school, pragmatic leader of high character and decency who doesn't want to waste valuable time - his or voters' - by wallowing in the political muck of the moment..."_
_" The quality of the national dialogue has taken a big hit recently, but a spirited general election contest between Clinton and Kasich would elevate the debate to a level we haven't seen in a long time. It is for that reason that we wholeheartedly endorse John Kasich for the Republican nomination."_

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117398:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117399:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
[From the Boston Globe:](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117400:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
_" New Hampshire Republicans can do their party a critical service on Feb. 9 by voting for an experienced political figure with a record of results, and thus dealing a blow to the divisive, demagogic candidates running on nativism and other political simplicities._
_
_
_The Globe urges them to support John Kasich, whose record as governor of Ohio shows him to be a pragmatic, fiscally responsible executive, but one who is also concerned with helping the poor. His success in that important swing state, and his record as a moderate conservative who is willing to compromise in pursuit of results, suggests he is the Republican hopeful most likely to be successful on the national stage._
_
_
_By voting for Kasich, New Hampshire can reward a candidate whose politics have been largely positive - and rebuke those candidates who have spent their campaign appealing to voters ' fears and biases."_

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117401:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117402:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)

**Will you make a[$25 or more contribution](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117396:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r) or [volunteer your time](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117403:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r) to help rally support in the early states?**

[JohnKasich.com/Donate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117396:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)
[JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117403:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)

Thank you for your continued support!

Sincerely,
**Beth Hansen**
Campaign Manager
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33117404:shuKU4yNW:m:1:958431888:CFD11D11E724C60D743B295F69A9434A:r)

along.
Rand is on the rise!
New polls show Rand in 5th place and rising
to almost 7 percent in Iowa! He is ahead of Bush, Christie and
Kasich.
The media is trying to block this message,
but Rand keeps gaining momentum.

Stand with Rand today. Show the naysayers:

In liberty,

Doug Stafford

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

I am at a crucial moment in my campaign. Without your
support, it could all be over -- and the Washington Cartel would
love nothing more than to see that happen.

IOWA CAUCUSES IN LESS THAN 6 DAYS!

Friend,

I am at a crucial moment in my campaign.

Without your support, it could all be over -- and the
Washington Cartel would love nothing more than to see that
happen.

Let me explain: my campaign must raise another $289,473 to
support our volunteers in Iowa, AND we have to do it before
Caucus day.

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $5 >>

The Washington Cartel and the liberal media -- clinging to
their way of life -- would rather see anyone but me as president.

Don't take my word for it -- see for yourself.

"5 reasons Ted Cruz is even more dangerous than Donald Trump"
- Salon

'He's a strict originalist on the meaning of the
Constitution;'
'He's a true believer who detests the federal government, and
has spent his life embracing radical right economic and political
views;'
'He's smart;'
'He's disciplined and strategic;' AND
'He's willing to destroy institutions.'

You see: the reasons listed above are the exact outline for
why the Washington Cartel AND the liberal media would rather
support Donald Trump than risk me winning the presidency.

I am fighting as hard as I can to make you proud and win the
Iowa Caucus, but to do it, I need your support.

There is only a little time left before the first votes are
cast.

I know you probably can't drop everything and spend a week in
Iowa, but you can still help in a huge way.
Using one of the links below, will you donate $5 or more to
sponsor a volunteer and help put me over the top in Iowa?

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $5 >>

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $35 >>

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $50 >>

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $250 >>

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $500 >>

IOWA STOP-GAP DONATE: I can help with $2700 >>

Friend, you have been a huge encouragement while I have
campaigned across America, but now I'm facing my biggest
challenge yet.

I hope and pray you will stick with me -- the eyes of the
nation are on Iowa in less then a week.

Thank you and God bless!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

| | | Good afternoon - I wanted to make sure you saw this great story on the Governor's 82-year-old father and his impressive efforts door knocking for his son every weekend in New Hampshire. ABC News followed him for a day of door knocking and as a determined Mr. Christie says, _" I come up here to help Chris, and they couldn't stop me if they tried. I'd come and do it on my own actually. It's a labor of love."_ Feel free to pass this story along to others. As you can see, he is outworking us all! Thanks,
Cam [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45952975:6XuV-orNK:m:1:1516426255:47B71D0F8AD6BC04364CEEB60AF961BB:r)
[WATCH: Chris Christie's 82-Year-Old Dad Has Become His Most Effective Super-Volunteer](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45952975:6XuV-orNK:m:1:1516426255:47B71D0F8AD6BC04364CEEB60AF961BB:r) **Chris Christie 's 82-Year-Old Dad Has Become His Most Effective Super-Volunteer**
Jordyn Phelps
[ABC News](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45952975:6XuV-orNK:m:1:1516426255:47B71D0F8AD6BC04364CEEB60AF961BB:r) It's 9:30 a.m. on an icy cold Saturday morning in Dover, New Hampshire, and Chris Christie's most dedicated volunteer is already hitting the pavement, going door-to-door in what will be a full day of canvassing for the man he believes should be the next President of the United States: His son. Dressed in a red zip-up winter coat and a scarf draped around his neck, the New Jersey governor's 82-year-old father, Bill Christie, makes his way across another ice-packed driveway at a confident clip to climb the steps of the sixth house he's visited that morning with no answer at the door. It's just the start of the some 160 doors he knocks on in an average day... Peter,

6 days. That's all the time we have left between now and the Iowa Caucuses on February 1st.

Everything we've worked for, month after month, will be put to the test and the American people will begin to decide whether or not Dr. Ben Carson becomes President Ben Carson.

As someone who has spent my life serving my country, I would not trust just anyone to be our Commander-in-Chief. While some say Dr. Carson doesn't have the right background for the job, I believe to my core that they are dead wrong.

Not only does Dr. Carson have the right temperament and judgment to serve as President, but he's had to answer more 2 AM phone calls and deal with more life-and-death crises than any other candidate in this race.

**That's a fact, and it's the main theme of our new TV ad that goes on the air today in Iowa. **

[**Right now, I ask you to take 30 seconds to watch it and make a donation to keep it on the air. Whether or not the good people of Iowa get a chance to see it is in your hands.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33123755:sa-TY5yN8:m:1:876315805:C8372B780F966350D1E216E9A2C9BCA7:r)

For decades, tens of thousands of parents across America trusted Dr. Carson enough to put the lives of their children in his hands. They believed, rightly so, that he had the necessary experience, wisdom and judgment.

Just like those tens of thousands of children, I know America will be safe in Dr. Carson's hands.

[**In a dangerous world, this is the message that the people of Iowa must hear and I ask you to urgently watch our ad and make a donation to keep it on the air.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33123755:sa-TY5yN8:m:1:876315805:C8372B780F966350D1E216E9A2C9BCA7:r)

Thank you for your support.

Respectfully,

Bob Dees

name: Mark Campbell
subject: Six Days
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Six days are all that separate us from the Iowa caucuses. Recent
polling suggests it's a neck and neck race, so everything we do
together in the next six days will have an enormous impact.

I wanted to share
with you a look at the organization we've put together:

County chairs in
each of Iowa's 99 counties.
Over 10,000
volunteers in just the state of Iowa.
1,800 precinct
captains and co-captains across Iowa.
247 activists and
leaders on our State Leadership Team.
An average of
over 20,000 phone calls made a day.
Over 2,000 doors
knocked each day.
Over 800
volunteers have traveled thousands of miles to join us at Camp
Cruz.
By Monday, Ted
will have completed the "Full Grassley", visiting and holding
events in all 99 of Iowa's counties. Click here to find this
week's events.

This incredible
effort on the ground would not be possible without the sacrifices
made by thousands of courageous conservatives and their families
from Iowa and from around the country, so for that, we thank you!

We also have a brand
new TV ad running statewide in Iowa, and you're going to want to
see it:

Even if you're not in
Iowa (but especially if you are), we need your help over the next
six days. Here's what you can do right now:

Sign up as to
volunteer with the campaign so our staff can get you plugged in
doing what you'd like to do to push Ted over the finish line.
Download and
install our #CruzCrew app so the campaign can keep in touch with
you wherever you are.
Share our latest
TV ad with your friends on Facebook, Twitter, or over email.
Talk to your
friends, family, and neighbors and encourage them to visit
tedcruz.org and join the effort. Tell them that this race matters
and their support for Ted now is critical.

Everyone at Team Cruz
is extremely thankful for everything you've done so far, but the
time is now to redouble our efforts to make Ted the Republican
nominee and the next President of the United States!

For Liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political
Director
Cruz for President

P.S. I also wanted to
share the following infographic with you as a visual
representation of the incredible organization we've put together
in advance of the caucuses in the Hawkeye State! You may download
it here.

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

name: Rob Portman
subject: We must fight back against the heroin epidemic
body:
| [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DtYu3l1gRCfo%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=1) Peter -- We are losing 20 Ohioans a week to heroin overdoses. Drug addiction is tearing families apart and devastating communities in Ohio. Too many are unable to achieve their God-given purpose because of this disease. We must fight back. I've traveled across Ohio learning more about what we can do to fight this epidemic. In Toledo, I heard [stories of recovery](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.toledoblade.com%2FMedical%2F2015%2F11%2F21%2FSen-Portman-hears-of-recovery-from-drug-addiction.html&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=2) and what works and what doesn't. Last week in Marion, [I heard from a family dealing with unimaginable loss ](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.marionstar.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2F2016%2F01%2F18%2Fportman-addresses-heroin-marion%2F78857248%2F&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=3)because of addiction. In Columbus, I visited Amethyst, Inc. and [met with women in long-term recovery](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fabc6onyourside.com%2Fnews%2Flocal%2Fsen-portman-speaks-to-drug-addicted-woman-in-ohio&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=4) from drug addiction. In Cleveland, [I saw compassionate care being given to babies](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwcpn.ideastream.org%2Fnews%2Fefforts-to-reduce-cases-of-pregnant-addicts-drug-dependent-newborns-continues&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=5) who were born addicted because their mothers were using while pregnant. When we released a video about addiction earlier this year, we heard in response many stories of people affected by addiction. There are few people across Ohio that have not been impacted by this crisis. [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DtYu3l1gRCfo%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=6) In the Senate, I am fighting to pass the Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act (CARA), legislation which will work to combat the prescription drug and heroin addiction crisis. We've made progress, but there's still a lot of work left to do to help families, help communities, and help people get their lives back on track. We must continue to work to help families and communities that need our support. Every Ohioan deserves a shot at a brighter future, and we must do all we can to treat and prevent drug addiction. All best,
Rob Portman [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=7)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=8)[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=9)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=addiction_2&n=10). -=-=-

Begin forwarded message:

| Dear Friend,

Despite the growing gun violence epidemic in our country, Republicans in Congress continue to prove that they care more about keeping the NRA happy than keeping our communities safe. Incredibly, Republicans in Congress have repeatedly blocked common sense gun reforms from even coming to a vote, despite the fact that polls show these measures have overwhelming public support across political parties and even in gun-owning households.

**[I urge you to stand with me today and demand that Congress respect the will of the people and permit a vote on gun safety reforms.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce6/70cdc2ba/47c7f01b/3965c06/4118776927/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/pass-gun-violence-prevention?source=em012516&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+I+urge+you+to+stand+with+me+today+and+de&utm_campaign=em12616")**

That's why I introduced the Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act, legislation that reduces gun violence by helping states implement licensing programs for the purchase of handguns similar to permits you need to drive a car.

Echoing the NRA talking points, Speaker Paul Ryan has called reform efforts "a form of intimidation." We must stand together and make our voices heard: Gun safety measures will save American lives. It's time for Republicans in Congress to step up and allow a vote on common sense gun reforms.

**[Please click here and sign the petition today to turn up the heat on Congress to set aside special interests and take action to reduce gun violence!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ce6/70cdc2ba/47c7f01b/3965c07/4118776927/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/pass-gun-violence-prevention?source=em012516&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+click+here+and+sign+the+petition+&utm_campaign=em12616")**

Chris

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: we're in a tough fight in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Love and kindness | Friend --

The other day, I was having breakfast at a diner in Cedar Rapids, and a nearby party picked up my table's check. They're big supporters of this campaign, and they wanted to do something kind for me because, they said, "We know you’ll pay it forward."

So we did. We picked up the check for a table near us -- that set off a chain reaction of neighbors and strangers buying each other breakfast on a chilly Sunday morning.

That's how this country ought to work, and it's how this campaign does work: Americans standing by each other, taking care of each other, and helping make each other's lives just a little bit kinder.

**Iowans will caucus in just six days, and we're in a tough fight there. I hope that you'll chip in $1 today to help us win, and I promise you with all my heart that I'll do everything I can to pay it forward:**

name: Rand Paul
subject: We learned tonight...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
It's the shot in the arm we've been waiting
for!
Earlier this evening, my campaign was
notified by Fox News that I will be on the main stage Thursday
night for the final Republican Debate before voting begins.

Patriot, this may be the most important
debate of the entire campaign.

Voters in the early states and around the
country will be locked in as they prepare to make their final
decisions on who to support.

I'm going to do everything I can to make a
big impression. And I'm counting on you to help me capitalize
with your most generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or even

name: Ted Cruz
subject: My Debate Challenge to Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

Friend, tonight I challenged Donald Trump to a debate --
one-on-one, any time, any place. Will Donald Duck this debate
too?

Friend,

Tonight, I challenged Donald Trump to a debate -- one-on-one, any
time, any place.
Will Donald Duck this debate too?

You see, we learned hours ago that Donald Trump is refusing to
face the voters in Iowa -- backing out of the ONLY GOP debate in
Iowa just four days before the Iowa Caucus.

My question for Donald is this: if you can't face Megyn Kelly,
how can you stand up to ISIS?

Or stand up to your pals in the Democrat party when it comes time
to repeal Obamacare?

Friend, if you are as disappointed as I am that Donald is
ducking this debate -- just six days before the votes are cast in
Iowa -- will you join me in demanding Donald debate me
one-on-one?

My friend Donald Trump is happy to sling insults and speculate
from afar, while tearing others down to try and lift himself up.
But now he is refusing to debate matters of substance.

I'm happy to go an hour and a half mano-a-mano, me and Donald,
with no moderators any time before the Iowa Caucus.

Will Donald Duck this Debate? Don't let him -- sign the
petition.

Afraid of my surge in the polls -- Donald has decided the best
way to boost his campaign is to play the media like a fiddle by
hiding his record, distracting voters, and tearing me down
personally.

He's even gone so far as to call me, 'a nasty person... a
liar...and a jerk.'

To set the record straight, I am challenging Donald Trump to a
one-on-one debate.

If it is really only Megyn Kelly that Donald is afraid of, he
will accept my challenge and debate me.

But we've got to do it before the Iowa Caucus -- click here to
sign the petition and help me ensure that Donald won't Duck
another debate.

This only happens with your help...

For liberty,

Ted Cruz
